meta.title: The Abraham Accords and the New Middle East
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute Adjunct Fellow Josh Block for a panel discussion with Mohammed Baharoon, Malcolm Hoenlein and Ariel Kahana on the Abraham Accords and the rise of the new Middle East. The Abraham Accords between Israel and the UAE celebrate their first anniversary this week, and represent perhaps the most important development in the quest for Arab-Israeli peace in 25 years. How has the agreement changed the region? This event will and assess the impact and potential of the Abraham Accords to strengthen American allies in the region and shore up their mutual interests.
